annual_rate.notes: Prejudgment interest under Wis. Stat. 138.04 — 5% (simple interest). This is PREjudgment interest (accruing before entry of judgment) and is separate from Wisconsin’s post-judgment rate; availability is limited by claim type (see the page). Verify against the statute text. Not legal advice.
